AEB2179: Finite Element Method

Course Information

  • Course Title: Finite Element Method
  • Course Code: AEB2179
  • Course Description: (to be updated)
  • Prerequisites:
    • Material Mechanics, Structural Mechanics, Structural Analysis,
    • Linear Algebra (Matrix Analysis)

Course Schedule:

Week 1-2: Introduction to FEM

Assessment Methods:

Midterm Exam - 20% Final Exam - 30% Homework Assignments - 20% Group Design Projects - 20% Class Participation and Quizzes - 10%

Textbook:

  • Hibbeler, R. C. (2012). Structural Analysis (8th ed). Prentice Hall.
  • Kwon, Y. W., & Bang, H. (1997). The finite element method using MATLAB. CRC Press.

Course Policies:

Attendance is mandatory; excessive absences may result in grade penalties. Late submissions for assignments will incur grade deductions. Academic integrity is expected; plagiarism or cheating will not be tolerated. Office Hours: The instructor will hold regular office hours for individual or group consultations.
